overview: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy), established in 1964, is one of India's top-ranked NITs, renowned for excellence in engineering, management, and applied sciences. The campus is vibrant with research, innovation, and a strong placement track record.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A++' accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,500 per semester for General/OBC (income > ₹5 lakh). Income-based and caste-based waivers apply. Additional ~₹25,150 per semester for other charges. Hostel & Mess: ~₹46,000–₹53,000 per semester.
₹35,000 per semester (Regular). SC/ST/PwD: Tuition exempted. Other charges ~₹26,000.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Qualcomm, NVIDIA, Goldman Sachs, Texas Instruments, HPCL, ONGC

keyTrends.pgSpecializations: Several M.Tech specialisations like Data Analytics and Power Systems recorded 100% placement
keyTrends.highestPackageTrend: Highest package consistently ₹50+ LPA; ₹52.89 LPA in full 2023–24 session

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level exams followed by JoSAA or CCMT or institute-level selection.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA/CCMT timelines and the institute's academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Other semester charges (~₹25,150) include hostel, mess, and service fees. One-time admission fees ₹35,300. Hostel charges differ for freshers and seniors.

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli, Tanjore Main Road, National Highway 67, Tiruchirappalli – 620015, Tamil Nadu, India
